channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SALASAR] Salasar Techno Engineering Ltd Hit by Middle East Conflict: LPG Supply Disruption Affects Production, Delivery, and Export
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Salasar Techno Engineering Ltd is currently experiencing a restriction in the supply of LPG due to a force majeure situation arising from the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. The disruption in LPG supply has adversely impacted the company's production activities, delivery of materials, and EPC business operations. The ongoing conflict in the Gulf region is also affecting the export of the Company’s products to that region. The company is actively coordinating with Oil Marketing Companies (OMCs) and the relevant government authorities to secure the supply of LPG. They are evaluating the impact arising from the ongoing disruption in the supply of LPG and monitoring the situation for any material developments.

  • Salasar Techno Engineering Ltd facing LPG supply disruption due to Middle East conflict
  • Disruption adversely impacts production activities, delivery of materials, and EPC business operations
  • Export of company's products to the Gulf region affected
  • Company actively coordinating with OMCs and government authorities for LPG supply
  • Evaluating the impact arising from the LPG supply disruption

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Salasar Techno Engineering Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [LATIMMETAL] La Tim Metal & Industries: Promoter Group Acquires Shares Under SEBI Regulations
item.description:
La Tim Metal & Industries Ltd. has disclosed a substantial acquisition of shares by the promoter and promoter group under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The acquisition took place on 13.03.2026, with La-tim Lifestyle & Resorts Limited acting on behalf of the promoter group. The total voting rights after the acquisition stand at 0.51%. The acquisition was made through the open market, with the company acquiring fully paid-up shares. The total equity share capital of the company before and after the acquisition is 13,06,30,626 and 18,40,824 respectively, with equity shares of Rs. 1/- each before the acquisition and Rs. 0.5/- each after the acquisition.

  • La Tim Metal & Industries Ltd. discloses share acquisition by promoter group under SEBI regulations.
  • Acquisition made by La-tim Lifestyle & Resorts Limited on behalf of the promoter group.
  • Total voting rights after acquisition stand at 0.51%.
  • Acquisition made through the open market.
  • Company acquired fully paid-up shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: La Tim Metal & Industries Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SRMENERGY] Spice Energy Pvt Ltd Acquires Majority Stake in SRM Energy Ltd
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Spice Energy Pvt Ltd has acquired a majority stake in SRM Energy Ltd, transferring 71.192% of the total paid-up capital. This acquisition was made on March 12, 2026, as per the Share Purchase Agreement dated September 25, 2025. The seller, Spice Energy Pvt Ltd, has been reclassified as 'Public' post this acquisition.

  • Spice Energy Pvt Ltd acquires 71.192% stake in SRM Energy Ltd
  • Acquisition completed on March 12, 2026
  • Seller reclassified as 'Public' post acquisition

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SRM ENERGY LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SURAJEST] Margarette Shwetha Thomas Acquires 7,000 Shares of Suraj Estate Developers Ltd, Up to 69.80% Voting Rights
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Margarette Shwetha Thomas & Others. The disclosure pertains to the acquisition of 7,000 equity shares of Suraj Estate Developers Limited. The acquirer, along with persons acting in concert (PACs), holds 3,33,44,279 shares carrying voting rights, which is 69.80% of the total diluted share/voting capital of the company. The acquisition was made through the stock exchange - Open Market. The equity share capital and total voting capital of the company remain unchanged after the acquisition. However, after the conversion of pending 13,30,000 warrants, the fully diluted capital will be INR 24,55,16,940/-.

  • Margarette Shwetha Thomas acquires 7,000 shares of Suraj Estate Developers Ltd
  • Acquirer holds 69.80% of the total diluted share/voting capital of the company
  • Acquisition made through the stock exchange - Open Market
  • Equity share capital and total voting capital of the company remain unchanged
  • After the conversion of pending 13,30,000 warrants, the fully diluted capital will be INR 24,55,16,940/-

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Suraj Estate Developers Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ODIGMA] Odigma Consultancy Solutions Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure from March 14 to 17, 2026
item.description:
Odigma Consultancy Solutions Ltd, in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the Company’s Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading, has announced the closure of the Trading Window for dealing in the securities of the Company. The closure will be in effect from Saturday, March 14, 2026, to Tuesday, March 17, 2026 (both days inclusive). The information is available on the Company's website at www.odigma.ooo.

  • Odigma Consultancy Solutions Ltd announces trading window closure
  • Closure from March 14, 2026, to March 17, 2026 (both days inclusive)
  • In accordance with Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Company’s Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading
  • Information available on the Company's website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Odigma Consultancy Solutions Ltd | Category: Other

item.title: [KOTIC] Kothari Industrial Corporation Ltd Expands Retail Presence with New 'Kickers' Outlet in Delhi
item.description:
Kothari Industrial Corporation Ltd has announced the opening of a new 'Kickers' brand outlet in DLF Midtown Plaza, Moti Nagar, Delhi - 110015, India. This expansion is part of the company's strategic retail initiative to strengthen the presence of the Kickers brand across key markets in India.

  • Kothari Industrial Corporation Ltd has opened a new 'Kickers' brand outlet in Delhi
  • The new outlet is located at DLF Midtown Plaza, Moti Nagar, Delhi - 110015, India
  • This expansion is part of the company's retail expansion strategy in India
  • The move aims to strengthen the presence of the Kickers brand across key markets in India

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KOTHARI INDUSTRIAL CORPORATION LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [MERCANTILE] Mercantile Ventures Ltd. Approves Scheme of Amalgamation with India Radiators Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Mercantile Ventures Limited, in a meeting held on Friday, March 13, 2026, approved the Scheme of Amalgamation with India Radiators Limited. The meeting was held pursuant to the order of the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Division Bench (Court-I) Chennai. The approval came after considering the views, questions, and clarifications sought by the equity shareholders, who were also offered the facility of remote e-voting. The meeting concluded at 12:27 P.M. (IST), and the equity shareholders who were present at the Meeting and had not cast their votes electronically were provided an opportunity to cast their votes through e-voting during the Meeting on CDSL platform.

  • Mercantile Ventures Limited approves Scheme of Amalgamation with India Radiators Limited.
  • The approval was given in a meeting held on Friday, March 13, 2026.
  • The meeting was held pursuant to the order of the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Division Bench (Court-I) Chennai.
  • Equity shareholders were offered the facility of remote e-voting.
  • The meeting concluded at 12:27 P.M. (IST), and equity shareholders were given the opportunity to cast their votes through e-voting during the Meeting on CDSL platform.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mercantile Ventures Ltd | Category: Merger

item.title: [ENCODE] Encode Packaging India Ltd: Statutory Auditors M/s Rishab Aggarwal & Associates Resign
item.description:
Encode Packaging India Ltd has announced the resignation of its statutory auditors, M/s Rishab Aggarwal & Associates, Chartered Accountants, with immediate effect. The auditors cited preoccupation in other official work as the reason for their resignation. The company has provided details of the auditors and the reasons for their resignation as per SEBI regulations.

  • M/s Rishab Aggarwal & Associates, Chartered Accountants have resigned as statutory auditors of Encode Packaging India Ltd.
  • The auditors have cited preoccupation in other official work as the reason for their resignation.
  • The company has provided details of the auditors and the reasons for their resignation as per SEBI regulations.
  • The resignation is effective from 13.03.2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Encode Packaging India Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [ENCODE] Encode Packaging India Ltd: Statutory Auditor M/s Rishab Aggarwal & Associates Resigns
item.description:
Encode Packaging India Ltd announced that its statutory auditor, M/s Rishab Aggarwal & Associates, Chartered Accountants, has tendered their resignation effective March 13, 2026. The auditors cited preoccupation in other official work as the reason for their resignation. The company has provided details of the auditors and the reasons for their resignation as per SEBI regulations.

  • M/s Rishab Aggarwal & Associates, Chartered Accountants have resigned as statutory auditors of Encode Packaging India Ltd.
  • The resignation is effective from March 13, 2026.
  • The auditors have cited preoccupation in other official work as the reason for their resignation.
  • The company has disclosed the information as per SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 and SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/CFD-PoD-1/P/CIR/2023/123.
  • The board meeting for the matter is scheduled from 5:00 PM to 5:30 PM.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Encode Packaging India Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [MFSL] Max Financial Services Ltd: Axis Max Life Changes Corporate Identity Number
item.description:
Max Financial Services Ltd has announced that Axis Max Life Insurance Limited’s Corporate Identity Number has been changed to U74899HR2000PLC143012 from U74899PB2000PLC045626. This change is due to the alteration of the company's Memorandum of Association, moving the Registered Office from Punjab to Haryana, outside the jurisdiction of the existing ROC ROC Chandigarh to ROC Haryana, as confirmed by an order of Regional Director dated 27/01/2026.

  • Axis Max Life Insurance Limited has changed its Corporate Identity Number.
  • The change is due to the alteration of the company's Memorandum of Association.
  • The Registered Office has been moved from Punjab to Haryana, outside the jurisdiction of the existing ROC.
  • The change has been confirmed by an order of Regional Director dated 27/01/2026.
  • Max Financial Services Ltd has made a disclosure about the change to the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Max Financial Services Ltd | Category: Business Update
